task: social trust evaluation and signed network analysis
input: online social network graph (explicit/implicit relationships, possibly signed)
output: trustworthiness score between any two users (Guardian); user embeddings for signed networks (SiGCN)
backbone: graph convolutional network (GCN) with multiple trust convolutional layers (Guardian); signed graph convolutional network (SiGCN)
key_idea: stack multiple trust convolutional layers to propagate trust information (Guardian); learn low-dimensional representations of signed networks with positive and negative links (SiGCN)
